name: Patriot Bank
description_short: Patriot Bank is an FDIC-insured regional bank serving the Tennessee area with personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, and lending products across 10+ branch locations.
description_long: Patriot Bank is a traditional community bank operating in Tennessee with multiple branch locations across the greater Memphis area, including Barretville, Millington, Arlington, Rosemark, Collierville, and Covington. The bank emphasizes accessibility and customer relationships, positioning itself as more than a transactional institution but as a partner through major life events. Founded as an established regional player, Patriot Bank maintains FDIC insurance, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government up to applicable limits. The bank serves both individual consumers and business customers with a full range of traditional banking services. Patriot Bank offers comprehensive personal banking products including multiple checking account tiers (Basic, Regular, NOW, Senior, and Student Checking), savings accounts (Regular and Elite options), Certificates of Deposit, Individual Retirement Accounts, and a Money Market Account. On the lending side, they provide Personal Loans, Auto Loans, Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOCs), and extensive mortgage options including FHA, USDA, and VA home loans with tailored support. Business customers can access Commercial Checking, Business Savings, Business Money Market Accounts, Business CDs, and a full suite of merchant and cash management services including Positive Pay Protection, Remote Deposit Capture, Payroll Direct Deposit, and ACH services. The bank also issues credit cards for both personal and business use. Patriot Bank differentiates itself through specialized mortgage programs (FHA, USDA, VA), explicit mention of S.A.F.E. ACT NMLS compliance for lending, and a dedicated Patriot Bank Financial Education Center for consumer resources. They offer both desktop and mobile banking through their proprietary Patriot Bank TN app, with online cash management services for business customers. The bank emphasizes fraud prevention with prominent scam alerts and maintains a local, community-oriented presence with multiple physical branch locations rather than operating as a purely online institution. As a regional brick-and-mortar bank, Patriot Bank is well-suited for customers seeking traditional banking relationships with local branch access and personalized service. However, the website provides limited transparency on specific fee structures, interest rates, loan terms, and lending requirements—customers must contact branches directly for detailed pricing. The bank does not appear to offer specialized products like credit-builder loans, secured cards, or alternative lending solutions, and there is no evidence of competitive rates or promotional offers visible on the public website.
services: Personal Checking Accounts (Basic, Regular, NOW, Senior, Student)
Personal Savings Accounts (Regular, Elite) and Money Market Accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
Merchant Card Services and Payroll Direct Deposit
Remote Deposit Capture and Wire Transfers
Online Banking and Mobile Banking (Patriot Bank TN App)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by the U.S. Government, protecting up to $250,000 per account
10+ physical branch locations across Tennessee with extended service hours for in-person banking
Specialized mortgage programs including FHA, USDA, and VA home loans with tailored support
Proprietary mobile app (Patriot Bank TN App) for convenient on-the-go banking and account management
Full business banking suite including Positive Pay Protection, Remote Deposit Capture, and merchant card services
Multiple checking and savings account tiers designed for different customer segments (Students, Seniors, Business)
Dedicated Financial Education Center and prominent fraud prevention resources with scam alerts
cons: Website does not display specific fee structures, interest rates, or loan terms—requires contacting branch directly
Limited to regional availability in Tennessee; no indication of online-only or national account opening
No evidence of competitive rate shopping tools or promotional offers displayed on website
Limited transparency on lending approval requirements, minimum balances, or promotional account bonuses
No mention of alternative products like credit-builder loans, secured cards, or fintech integrations
best_for: Tennessee residents seeking traditional banking with local branch access and personalized service
Small business owners needing comprehensive cash management, payroll, and merchant services
Homebuyers eligible for FHA, USDA, or VA loans seeking specialized mortgage programs
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and relationship banking over online-only convenience
diagnosis: Patriot Bank is best for Tennessee customers who value local branch relationships, FDIC-insured deposits, and personalized service for traditional banking needs like checking, savings, mortgages, and small business accounts. The main caveat is that the website lacks pricing transparency—customers must contact branches directly to compare rates, fees, and loan terms, making it difficult to evaluate competitiveness without direct outreach.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Patriot Bank is an FDIC-insured regional bank serving Tennessee with checking, savings, mortgages, and lending products.
